modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues with setting up and removing mail forwarding in Office 365

full_description_text:  
User wants to set up mail forwarding.  
User also wants to remove mail forwarding.  
User is asking about transferring mail to a different email account.  
This is related to Microsoft Office 365 mail settings.
